daily_image.alt: A loving family photo for Meme

prayer.title: Memorare
prayer.text: Remember, O most gracious Virgin Mary, that never was it known that anyone who fled to thy protection, implored thy help, or sought thy intercession was left unaided. Inspired by this confidence, I fly unto thee, O Virgin of virgins, my Mother. Amen.

thought.headline: Today has a holy purpose.
thought.body: Even a day of waiting can be offered to God. Your prayers, patience, and courage can become a quiet gift for the people you love.
thought.verse: Offer your bodies as a living sacrifice, holy and pleasing to God. — Romans 12:1

blessing: May the Holy Spirit give you quiet courage for each hour.
practice: Light a small candle in your heart and offer this day to Jesus.

daily_readings.label: USCCB Daily Mass Readings
daily_readings.note: Read or listen to today’s Catholic Mass readings from the United States Conference of Catholic Bishops.
